mnemonics: PoW: Proof of Work is like a 'gold rush' where miners compete to solve puzzles for rewards.
PoS: Proof of Stake is like 'interest on savings' where validators earn rewards based on their stake.
keyPoints: Consensus mechanisms ensure all nodes agree on the state of the blockchain.
Proof of Work (PoW) uses computational power to validate transactions and create new blocks.
Proof of Stake (PoS) uses validators who lock up cryptocurrency to validate transactions.
commonMistakes: Confusing PoW with mining and PoS with staking - they are related but distinct concepts.
Assuming all blockchains use the same consensus mechanism - different blockchains may use PoW, PoS, or others.
